channel.title: Posts on My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on My New Hugo Site

item.title: Falls are Hard
item.description: Throughout my college career, I have found that my fall semesters are hard and my springs are long. Each fall is harder than the last. This being my senior year during a pandemic, its going to be a record breaker again. My hopes after this year are to go to graduate school, so I have (yet) to study for the GRE and take the test. I am pursuing an honor’s thesis so I will be doing extracurricular research and meetings outside of class.

item.title: Hello R Markdown
item.description: R Markdown This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com. You can embed an R code chunk like this: summary(cars) ## speed dist ## Min. : 4.0 Min. : 2.00 ## 1st Qu.:12.0 1st Qu.: 26.00 ## Median :15.0 Median : 36.00 ## Mean :15.4 Mean : 42.98 ## 3rd Qu.
